name: vercel-ai-confirmation
title: Action Confirmation
author: Vercel
description: A state-aware approval prompt for requested, accepted, and rejected actions.

changes: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases.
Replaced the AI SDK type-only tool state with an equivalent local state union.

modifications.change: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases. Replaced the AI SDK type-only tool state with an equivalent local state union.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component portable and meet security, accessibility, reduced-motion, and RTL requirements without changing its product role.
